testsuite.name: Implement validation and error handling for skill management

testcase.name: Implement validation and error handling for skill management 01 Validates required fields proactively on submission
testcase.classname: 01 Validates required fields proactively on submission

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `.alert-error-custom`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `.alert-error-custom`, but never found it. at Context.eval (webpack://spring2_test/./cypress/e2e/sprint2/skill_management_validation.cy.js:31:38)

testcase.name: Implement validation and error handling for skill management 02 Ensures skill name cannot be empty and attributes validated
testcase.classname: 02 Ensures skill name cannot be empty and attributes validated

testcase.name: Implement validation and error handling for skill management 03 Ensures category and proficiency level must be explicitly selected
testcase.classname: 03 Ensures category and proficiency level must be explicitly selected

testcase.name: Implement validation and error handling for skill management 04 Valid skill entries are natively accepted without errors
testcase.classname: 04 Valid skill entries are natively accepted without errors

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Validation Passed Skill' within the element: <div.skills-grid> but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Validation Passed Skill' within the element: <div.skills-grid> but never did. at Context.eval (webpack://spring2_test/./cypress/e2e/sprint2/skill_management_validation.cy.js:76:67)
